author: nottherealtar
install_msg: Run `/gamedatemate guide` (or `[p]gamedatemate guide`) first. Your bot needs **Presence** + **Server Members** intents (Discord Developer Portal and `[p]set intents` on Red).
name: GameDateMate
short: Sync Discord presence to the Game Date Mate web app
description: Forwards member presence (and voice join/leave) to your deployed Game Date Mate app via POST /api/discord/presence. Per-guild URL, webhook secret, and enable toggle. Includes setup guide, status, and connection test.
end_user_data_statement: Stores per-guild app base URL, webhook secret, and enabled flag only.
